# Scolto

> Scolto is a team of senior AI analysts you can brief on demand. It runs social listening, trend detection, campaign tracking, and competitive intelligence - surfacing the signals brand and marketing teams need without a permanent in-house analytics staff.

## Core

- [Home](https://scolto.com/): Product overview, capabilities, and how Scolto's AI analysts work for brand, marketing, and competitive-intel teams.

## What Scolto does

- **Social listening** - monitors public conversation across platforms and surfaces what matters to your brand.
- **Trend detection** - identifies emerging cultural and category trends early enough to act on them.
- **Campaign tracking** - measures the reach, sentiment, and lift of marketing campaigns across channels.
- **Competitive intelligence** - tracks what competing brands are doing, saying, and shipping.
